narrative:
Strongsville-04-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,180 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
